commands.review_summary:
The PR moves internal trace-line stripping from Discord-specific reply safety into the shared assistant-visible text sanitizer, adds error-context sanitizer coverage, and updates Discord delivery/process tests.

PR surface: Source +26, Tests +56. Total +82 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the introduced regression: current main strips plain `analysis:`/`commentary:` labels at the Discord boundary, while the PR's replacement regex omits them. I did not run tests because this review is read-only and the provided proof is mocked/unit-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review and contributor action are needed because the PR has a channel-label leak and only mock/unit proof; automation cannot provide the contributor's real Discord environment proof.

target.title: Suppress internal agent failure traces before channel delivery
target.body:
## Summary

- Move internal agent/tool trace-line stripping into the shared assistant-visible text sanitizer instead of keeping Discord-only regex policy.
- Strip trace-only error-context payloads before user-facing delivery while preserving explicit tool-progress payloads.
- Keep a small Discord send-boundary guard for transcript-backed final text replacement, which happens after dispatcher normalization.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/shared/text/assistant-visible-text.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-helpers.sanitizeuserfacingtext.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/reply-delivery.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/followup-runner.test.ts -t "tool progress"`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Internal agent/tool failure trace lines such as `⚠️ 🛠️ \`run ... (agent)\` failed` are no longer delivered as user-visible Discord messages when they are the only final text, and the generic assistant-visible sanitizer now removes the same trace shape for other delivery users.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout on current `origin/main` after rebasing commit `16b207d685`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/shared/text/assistant-visible-text.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-helpers.sanitizeuserfacingtext.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/reply-delivery.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/followup-runner.test.ts -t "tool progress"`; `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`.

Evidence after fix: Shared sanitizer tests strip warning/tool trace lines and preserve fenced examples and ordinary `Analysis:` headings; Discord delivery tests drop pure internal warning payloads while preserving media/rich payloads when text scrubs empty; process tests confirm warning finals are suppressed instead of sent.

Observed result after fix: Focused sanitizer and Discord tests passed, and the tool-progress regression test passed with 4 matching tests and 63 skipped by filter.

What was not tested: Live Discord delivery was not exercised; this is covered by unit-level delivery/process tests with mocked Discord sends.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
